reviews.review_title: kind the good and kind the bad
reviews.review_description: i don't care if this game is really bad i still love it

The graphics are amazing but when I join a lobby there is no players at all and I mean empty but liek the horror is good I'd rather say make more maps/levels for the horror mode or just make maps for the game because there is only 4 maps horror map, the shop, parkour, and the forest. But it also gives a really good vibe when playing the game but this game needs to have more players honestly.

When i downloaded this game i knew i was gonna have fun. When i loaded up in the game it was Good Graphics, Gtag type movement and noise, and the songs that were played in the game were chill logic type beats. Love this game!
